data.author: k1832
data.message:
fix(agnocast_kmod): add .owner = THIS_MODULE to file_operations (#1080)

* fix(agnocast_kmod): add .owner = THIS_MODULE to file_operations

Without .owner, the kernel does not hold a module reference when
userspace opens /dev/agnocast, allowing rmmod to succeed while
file descriptors are still open.

Signed-off-by: Keita Morisaki <keita.morisaki@tier4.jp>

* test(agnocast_kmod): add rmmod refcount test for .owner fix

Verifies that rmmod fails with EBUSY while /dev/agnocast is open
and succeeds after the fd is closed.

Signed-off-by: Keita Morisaki <keita.morisaki@tier4.jp>

---------

Signed-off-by: Keita Morisaki <keita.morisaki@tier4.jp>
Co-authored-by: Koichi Imai <45482193+Koichi98@users.noreply.github.com>
